title: Chewy Garlicky Spinach Italian Stir-fry
description: This dish combines the savory flavors of Italy with a twist of garlickiness and chewiness in a spinach-centric recipe thats perfect for a romantic dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Sous-vide bag
ingredients.notes: Pre-soaked in water for sous-vide cooking

ingredients.name: Crumbled feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional for added richness and texture

instructions: Heat the sous-vide bag in a water bath at 70°C (158°F) for about 30 minutes.
While the sous-vide bag is cooking, chop the garlic finely and set aside. Remove the bag from the water bath and allow it to cool slightly.
Remove spinach from the sous-vide bag and gently squeeze out excess liquid. Cut into bite-sized pieces if needed.
In a pan over medium heat, add 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Once hot, add the chopped garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the cooled sous-vide spinach to the pan. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until the leaves start to wilt slightly but remain chewy.
Stir in the soy sauce and sliced almonds. Season with salt if desired.
Fold in crumbled feta cheese if using, stirring gently so as not to break up the spinach too much.
